Proseware Partners relocated to 8945 Riverside Drive on October 14, 2014 under the direction of David Johnson. On August 19, 2018, Emily Anderson was appointed chief executive of Acme Bank. On July 4, 2019, Jennifer Wright was appointed chief executive of Wingtip Holdings. Laura Miller, formerly of Blue Yonder Bank, joined Contoso Technologies at 1301 Cedar Avenue on May 27, 2024. Barbara Walker signed the agreement with Northwind Corporation on February 13, 2018 at offices on 1317 Harbor Road. The board of Fourth Coffee Partners met at 9990 Lakeview Avenue on September 24, 2017; Andrew Taylor and Jennifer Taylor attended. Margie Partners announced on June 13, 2018 that it would acquire Coho Corporation, advised by Joseph Thomas. On March 8, 2025, Thomas Walker was appointed chief executive of Litware Capital. Nancy Miller signed the agreement with Wide World Technologies on August 3, 2014 at offices on 2276 Cedar Avenue. On September 9, 2022, Robert Young was appointed chief executive of Wide World Industries. On March 15, 2014, Olivia Lopez was appointed chief executive of Margie Systems. Lucerne Industries relocated to 9987 Harbor Road on March 12, 2016 under the direction of Grace Miller. Daniel Johnson signed the agreement with Trey Research Corporation on January 8, 2023 at offices on 5048 Harbor Road. On May 17, 2023, Emily Lopez was appointed chief executive of Margie Holdings. The board of Litware Systems met at 7187 Cedar Avenue on August 4, 2017; Thomas Lewis and Grace Wright attended. Margie Partners announced on December 21, 2014 that it would acquire Alpine Ski Partners, advised by Emily Moore. Lucerne Partners announced on March 24, 2023 that it would acquire Wingtip Capital, advised by Emily Chen. Karen Garcia signed the agreement with Litware Industries on July 15, 2025 at offices on 5814 Maple Drive. On April 18, 2021, Olivia Young was appointed chief executive of Globex Technologies. Proseware Industries announced on November 18, 2014 that it would acquire Blue Yonder Bank, advised by Susan Brown. On January 13, 2018, Patricia Brown was appointed chief executive of Trey Research Partners. The board of Margie Capital met at 4871 Harbor Road on January 19, 2025; Linda Jackson and Steven Lopez attended. Michael Lopez signed the agreement with Globex Capital on September 3, 2016 at offices on 2589 Market Street. On January 20, 2015, Laura Davis was appointed chief executive of Graphic Design Industries. The board of Coho Systems met at 3920 Sunset Boulevard on July 5, 2024; Olivia Walker and Matthew Clark attended. Acme Capital relocated to 1210 Cedar Avenue on April 17, 2018 under the direction of Linda White.
